title: [InstCombine] Fix constant swap case of fcmp + fadd + sel xfrm

tests.outside_scope_reason: Uses double precision type instead of float - all existing test cases use float type only, this tests the transformation works across different floating-point types

alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define double @test_fcmp_oge_fadd_select_constant_double(double %in) {
#0:
  %cmp1 = fcmp oge double %in, 0.000000
  %add = fadd nnan nsz double %in, 1.000000
  %sel = select nnan nsz i1 %cmp1, double %add, double 1.000000
  ret double %sel
}
=>
define double @test_fcmp_oge_fadd_select_constant_double(double %in) {
#0:
  %sel = fmax nsz double %in, 0.000000
  %add = fadd nnan nsz double %sel, 1.000000
  ret double %add
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

Summary:
  1 correct transformations
  0 incorrect transformations
  0 failed-to-prove transformations
  0 Alive2 errors

tests.outside_scope_reason: Uses constant value 2.5 instead of 1.0 - all existing test cases use constant 1.0, this verifies the transformation works with arbitrary constant values

alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define float @test_fcmp_oge_fadd_select_constant_2_5(float %in) {
#0:
  %cmp1 = fcmp oge float %in, 0.000000
  %add = fadd nnan nsz float %in, 2.500000
  %sel = select nnan nsz i1 %cmp1, float %add, float 2.500000
  ret float %sel
}
=>
define float @test_fcmp_oge_fadd_select_constant_2_5(float %in) {
#0:
  %sel = fmax nsz float %in, 0.000000
  %add = fadd nnan nsz float %sel, 2.500000
  ret float %add
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

Summary:
  1 correct transformations
  0 incorrect transformations
  0 failed-to-prove transformations
  0 Alive2 errors

tests.outside_scope_reason: Combines negative zero comparison with swapped select operands - existing tests use positive zero and this tests the interaction of neg-zero with the Swapped parameter path

alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define float @test_fcmp_oge_fadd_select_constant_neg_zero_swapped(float %in) {
#0:
  %cmp1 = fcmp oge float %in, -0.000000
  %add = fadd nnan nsz float %in, 1.000000
  %sel = select nnan nsz i1 %cmp1, float 1.000000, float %add
  ret float %sel
}
=>
define float @test_fcmp_oge_fadd_select_constant_neg_zero_swapped(float %in) {
#0:
  %sel = fmin nsz float %in, 0.000000
  %add = fadd nnan nsz float %sel, 1.000000
  ret float %add
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

Summary:
  1 correct transformations
  0 incorrect transformations
  0 failed-to-prove transformations
  0 Alive2 errors
